subject: Excited to connect at the conference, Nicholas Wong
body:
Hi Nicholas Wong,

Saw you'll be at the conference and noticed your work at your team. Would love to swap notes on ai, gtm, revops.

[Lightfern will polish this in Gmail]


--- CONTEXT FOR LIGHTFERN (remove before sending) ---
Context for Lightfern (delete before sending):
Warmth sends scoring + lead data here so Lightfern can populate the
follow-up in Gmail. Human reviews/polishes in Gmail, then sends.

CLIENT:
  sender_email: getwarmth@gmail.com
  sender_name: Warmth

SCORES:
  icp_score: 0.0
  warmth_score: 8.58
  predicted_score: 8.58

LEAD:

interests: ai, gtm, revops
